name: AI Resume Coach
description: Production GenAI SaaS platform handling 1,000+ AI interviews/month. Built with LangGraph multi-agent system (6 autonomous AI agents), real-time voice interview engine, 3-AI panel interviews, live code editor with AI review, RAG pipeline, and full recruiter automation suite. Dual AI provider strategy (Groq + OpenAI) with zero-interruption mid-session failover.
features: 🎙️ AI Interview Engine — Real-time STT/TTS voice interviews with persona-based AI interviewers (Google style, Amazon LP, Strict, Friendly)
👥 3-AI Panel Interview — Technical AI + HR AI + Domain AI simultaneously in one chat session
💻 Pair Programming Mode — AI gives incomplete code stubs; Live Monaco/VS Code editor with AI code review (correctness, complexity, bugs)
📊 Real-time Confidence Analyzer — detects hesitant/confident/nervous tone after each answer
🎯 Adaptive Difficulty — AI adjusts question difficulty based on live performance; Progressive 3-level hint system with score penalty
🔍 Proctoring Suite — tab switch, face detection, noise detection, copy-paste monitoring, Video Presence Analysis (eye contact + body language via OpenAI Vision)

🤖 LangGraph Multi-Agent System — 6 autonomous agents: Resume Improvement (ATS ≥70 loop), Candidate Screening (live GitHub API), Learning Path, Panel Interview (3 AI judges), Market Intelligence (salary + demand), Interview Evaluator (contradiction detection)
📝 Job Application Agent — Gap analysis, custom cover letter (3 tones), resume auto-tailor to JD keywords, JD URL scraper, follow-up email templates, direct HR email via SMTP

🏢 Recruiter Suite — Bulk campaigns (CSV), ZIP resume upload (50 files), AI Job Match ranking, auto-shortlist pipeline, side-by-side candidate comparison, webhook integrations (Slack, Greenhouse, Lever, Workday)
🧠 RAG Pipeline — Pinecone vector DB, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (1536 dims), pseudo-embedding fallback, context-aware question generation
⚡ AI Provider Strategy — Groq (primary, free+fast) → OpenAI auto-fallback on rate limit; zero interview interruption, admin email alert on switch
💳 Stripe billing — Free/Pro/Enterprise tiers, webhook integrations, 50% token cost reduction via prompt compression

name: PathLab — Online Pathology Lab
description: Full-stack online pathology lab platform enabling patients to book diagnostic tests online, get home sample collection, and receive digital reports. Trusted by patients across India with 500+ tests, NABL accredited lab processes, and fast 24-48 hour report delivery.
features: Online test booking with 500+ diagnostic tests and health packages
Home sample collection scheduling with trained agents
Digital report delivery within 24-48 hours
NABL accredited lab process integration
Patient dashboard for booking history and report downloads
Admin panel for managing tests, agents, and reports

name: Seekrz
description: Live mobile application on App Store & Play Store for users and store owners across multiple locations. Features trade offers between stores with automated handling, comprehensive payment integrations, and high-performance APIs under heavy loads.
features: Trade offer system between stores with auto-cancel after 48 hours
4 payment gateway integrations (Stripe, ACH, Apple Pay, Cash Pay)
Bulk order functionality with high-performance APIs
Notification systems and user/store authentication
Cron job automation for trade handling workflows

name: Cellcast
description: Australia-based bulk SMS communication platform for client engagement. Handles high-volume SMS campaigns with credit management, Stripe payment integration for top-ups and subscriptions, and full transactional transparency.
features: Bulk SMS campaign management with high reliability
Stripe payment gateway for top-ups and subscriptions
SMS credit and user balance management
Transactional logging for full transparency
Backend optimization for cost reduction and scalability

name: Speech Therapy Medical App
description: Medical application built with NestJS for speech therapy services. Focuses on secure patient data handling, appointment scheduling, and session management with healthcare compliance standards.
features: Secure patient data handling with healthcare compliance
Appointment scheduling and session management
Real-time communication features
Role-based access control for doctors and patients

name: Austin Indian
description: Community platform helping Indians in Austin, Texas discover local Indian restaurants. Features comprehensive search, filtering, and location-based discovery to connect the Indian community with local businesses.
features: Complete backend APIs for search and filtering
Location-based restaurant discovery
Community-focused platform for Indians in Austin

name: Online Course Platform
description: Platform built from scratch using Node.js for online course management, similar to Udemy model. Features comprehensive agency module, mastermind modules, and Facebook integration for revenue generation.
features: Course management and mastermind modules
Agency module for centralized functionality
JWT authentication and Twilio SMS integration
Automated membership management with Node-Cron
MongoDB Aggregation Pipelines for complex queries
